name: Bambietta Basterbine
description:
("Save her or let her die by Giselle" scenario.)

Bambietta is a minor antagonist from Bleach. She is a Quincy and a Sternritter serving in the Wandenreich army led by Yhwach and given the Schrift, E the "Explode". She is the self-proclaimed leader of a small all-female entourage of fellow Sternritter consisting of Giselle, Meninas, Candice and Liltotto.

She sports traditional quincy attire being a buttoned jacket, gloves, skirt and boots as well as a military cap all of which are primarily white.

As a Quincy she possesses the abilities of one such as manipulating reishi to form weaponry like bows and such, her preferred spirit weapon resembles that of a Chinese dao. Her particular Schrift allows her to use reishi to form bombs which can bypass defenses and can even turn matter it touches into bombs themselves. She can also achieve Vollstandig which hers is called "Zofiel", enhancing her Schrift to form reishi bombs in clusters. In her Vollstandig she manifests a red spiked halo with matching bat-like wings and reishi balls on the ends which she can fire as bombs.
creator: AnimeMan1993
